name: io.github.rangertaha/coinbase-mcp
title: Coinbase MCP Server
description: Coinbase Advanced Trade API as MCP tools: public market data plus authenticated accounts, orders, portfolios, convert, fees, payments, futures, and perpetuals. Written in Go; runs over stdio.

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: CDP API key name from the Coinbase Developer Platform (organizations/{org}/apiKeys/{key}). Optional: public market-data tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: CDP API private key (ECDSA PEM or base64 Ed25519). Set together with COINBASE_API_KEY.

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to hide every mutating tool (order placement, cancels, portfolio changes).

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_TOOLSETS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated toolset names to enable (products, accounts, orders, portfolios, convert, fees, payments, futures, perpetuals, keys), or all (default).

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated individual tool names to allowlist within the enabled toolsets.

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Coinbase API base URL (default https://api.coinbase.com).
